Marc Chagall

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
I and the Village
by Marc Chagall
Cubist / Expressionist · 1911
A green-faced peasant and a white goat exchange a look across a village that floats and spins. Chagall's memory of his hometown of Vitebsk, filtered through Paris.
←Caravaggio Nek Chand→
